channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Piles of fly tipped clothes domestic rubbish and pallets on corner of Crimscott st and willow walk, 15th March
item.description:
This is new and an eyesore, the rubbish needs to be collected asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willow Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes and uneven rd, 15th March
item.description:
The road part of gallon close se78sy is very uneven and it has pit holes to. When you are driving on the close the car is wobbling as the road is so uneven and damaged . It's going to cause damage to our cars

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gallon Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken lock on bollard, 15th March
item.description:
Paddock broken on bollard blocking through street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Oakhurst Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near crossover for no.40, 15th March
item.description:
"Post Office Telephones" access cover very loose and rocking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Ornan Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking multiples bikes on pavement outside of a elderly reaident home, 15th March
item.description:
These bikes are consistently parked on the pavement and directly outside blocking access to an elderly resident. This makes it near impossible to get this resident out of her home for medical appointments. We have trie sit knows to ask them to politely move their bikes. The bikes are preventing any prams or wheelchairs from using the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tristram Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and broken glass, 15th March
item.description:
Fly tipping and broken glass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Silver car parked halfway on disabled parking bay., 15th March
item.description:
Parked halfway on the designated disabled parking spot.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Lyndhurst Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside No 17 is a continuous issue with the people living who seem free to dumped rubbish on footpath eventually they dumped at end of road by garages next to passage way and I don’t see why southwark should keep moving there rubbish fine them, 15th March
item.description:
Dumping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Ivanhoe Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Registration number not on gov.uk, 15th March
item.description:
Randomly parked vehicle. Been here for a couple of weeks. Unable to check whether taxed or insured. Gov.uk does not recognise numberplate which makes me think it is cloned

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prince Rupert Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kilburn bridge pub Brondesbury villas fruit stalk, 15th March
item.description:
See photo 2 instances

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 15 and 3 Brondesbury villas, 15th March
item.description:
Bagged waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Numerous large and deep potholes in Petts Wood Road, 15th March
item.description:
Petts Wood road has numerous potholes. These are a risk because cannot be avoided unless the car passes in the lane where car comes from the opposite direction. I saw you have the pictures of many of them already and considering the gravity of the situation plus the length of time these have been reported you should have already fixed the stretch of Petts Wood road located between Tudor Way and Chislehurst Road. Can you please send someone urgently and fix the entire problem before an accident happens?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 15th March
item.description:
Same place, same problem - some people seem to confuse Lewisham Way for the local authority waste recycling centre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewisham Way, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not taxed or insured, 15th March
item.description:
Checked against gov.uk road tax. Vehicle isn't found On Rochester way (corner of granby road) Advertising "we buy any car"

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grangehill Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 15th March
item.description:
Dead for on the payment opposite 114 erith road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
